_____javascript
const { latitude, longitude } = { latitude: 49.393813868077764, longitude: 17.22388380435019 };
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m&timezone=auto`;
const res = await fetch(url);
const data = await res.json();

const c = data.current || {};
const code = c.weather_code;
const map = {
  0: "Clear sky",
  1: "Mainly clear",
  2: "Partly cloudy",
  3: "Overcast",
  45: "Fog",
  48: "Depositing rime fog",
  51: "Light drizzle",
  53: "Moderate drizzle",
  55: "Dense drizzle",
  56: "Light freezing drizzle",
  57: "Dense freezing drizzle",
  61: "Slight rain",
  63: "Moderate rain",
  65: "Heavy rain",
  66: "Light freezing rain",
  67: "Heavy freezing rain",
  71: "Slight snow fall",
  73: "Moderate snow fall",
  75: "Heavy snow fall",
  77: "Snow grains",
  80: "Slight rain showers",
  81: "Moderate rain showers",
  82: "Violent rain showers",
  85: "Slight snow showers",
  86: "Heavy snow showers",
  95: "Thunderstorm",
  96: "Thunderstorm with slight hail",
  99: "Thunderstorm with heavy hail"
};
return {
  location: { latitude, longitude },
  weather: map[code] || `Weather code ${code}`,
  temperature: c.temperature_2m,
  apparent_temperature: c.apparent_temperature,
  humidity: c.relative_humidity_2m,
  wind_speed: c.wind_speed_10m,
  time: c.time,
  timezone: data.timezone
};

_____javascript
return await fetch('https://wttr.in/?format=j1').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>({
  area: j.nearest_area?.[0]?.areaName?.[0]?.value,
  region: j.nearest_area?.[0]?.region?.[0]?.value,
  country: j.nearest_area?.[0]?.country?.[0]?.value,
  current: j.current_condition?.[0] && {
    tempC: j.current_condition[0].temp_C,
    feelsLikeC: j.current_condition[0].FeelsLikeC,
    desc: j.current_condition[0].weatherDesc?.[0]?.value,
    humidity: j.current_condition[0].humidity,
    windKph: j.current_condition[0].windspeedKmph
  }
}))

_____javascript
const { latitude, longitude } = { latitude: 49.393813868077764, longitude: 17.22388380435019 };
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,apparent_temperature,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,relative_humidity_2m&timezone=auto`;
const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json());
const code = data?.current?.weather_code;
const map = {
  0: "Clear sky",
  1: "Mainly clear",
  2: "Partly cloudy",
  3: "Overcast",
  45: "Fog",
  48: "Depositing rime fog",
  51: "Light drizzle",
  53: "Moderate drizzle",
  55: "Dense drizzle",
  61: "Slight rain",
  63: "Moderate rain",
  65: "Heavy rain",
  71: "Slight snow fall",
  73: "Moderate snow fall",
  75: "Heavy snow fall",
  80: "Rain showers",
  81: "Heavy rain showers",
  82: "Violent rain showers",
  95: "Thunderstorm"
};
return {
  location: { latitude, longitude },
  current: data.current,
  description: map[code] || `Weather code ${code}`,
  timezone: data.timezone
}
